sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 1.70 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.1)

statement.latex: Let$p$be a prime number and let$G$be the group of all matrices of the form {$( {cc} 1+p & p \\ p & 1+p )$}, where$$,$$,$$,$$are rational numbers with denominators coprime to$p$. Does$G$have the property$\,$? { Yu.\,I.\,Merzlyakov} Yes, it does (G.\,A.\,Noskov, Siberian Math.~J., { 14} (1973), 475--477).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
